prompt: Architectural minimalist logo on pure black background. The letters MM are formed by simple geometric shapes — two identical triangular peaks side by side, like mountain peaks or a zigzag roofline, created with clean straight white lines of consistent thickness. The shape is abstract but clearly reads as two M's. It looks like an architectural blueprint symbol or a minimal mountain range icon. Below the geometric mark, 'MM AGENCY' appears in clean modern sans-serif type, all caps, with a cyan (#00E3FF) dot at the end. The design is extremely minimal — only white lines and one cyan dot on black. Feels like a premium architecture firm or Nordic design studio logo. Sharp vector quality.
